Title: xCart — removeShipment Happy Path
Preconditions: Runner-native. addItem + set shipment (captures shipmentId from shipments[0].id) + removeShipment → verify shipments[] empty.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=remove_shipment] errors[] empty
[DATA label=remove_shipment] data.removeShipment.id is non-null
[COUNT label=remove_shipment] data.removeShipment.shipments.length = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=remove_shipment] shipmentId no longer present in shipments[]
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; shipments[] still contains removed shipment; shippingTotal.amount > 0 after remove

Title: xCart — removeShipment with Invalid shipmentId
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls removeShipment on zero-GUID without any real shipment present. Verifies graceful structured response.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Either errors[] non-empty with not-found OR silent no-op (shipments[] unchanged). NO HTTP 500 or stack traces.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; unhandled exception; real shipments removed by invalid ID

Title: xCart — addOrUpdateCartPayment Sets DefaultManualPaymentMethod
Preconditions: Runner-native. Adds item, then sets payment method DefaultManualPaymentMethod. Verifies payments[] populated.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=set_payment] errors[] empty
[DATA label=set_payment] data.addOrUpdateCartPayment.id is non-null
[DATA label=set_payment] data.addOrUpdateCartPayment.payments is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] payments[] contains at least one entry with paymentGatewayCode=DefaultManualPaymentMethod
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; payments[] empty after mutation; paymentGatewayCode mismatch

Title: xCart — addOrUpdateCartPayment Changes Method
Preconditions: Runner-native. Sets payment to DefaultManualPaymentMethod, then calls addOrUpdateCartPayment again with same gateway to verify idempotent update (no duplicate payments[] entries).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=set_payment_first] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=set_payment_again] errors[] empty
[DATA label=set_payment_again] data.addOrUpdateCartPayment.payments is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] payments.length stays ≤ 1 after second call (idempotent, no duplicate entry). Both calls use same gateway.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; payments[] has 2 duplicate entries after second call (non-idempotent)

Title: xCart — mergeCart Happy Path
Preconditions: Runner-native. Creates a named second cart (addItem with cartName) and merges it into the default. Verifies default cart absorbs items.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=merge] errors[] empty
[DATA label=merge] data.mergeCart.id is non-null
[COUNT label=merge] data.mergeCart.itemsCount >= 2
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] mergeCart.items[] contains both PRODUCT_1 and PRODUCT_2 (from second cart). Review evidence.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; itemsCount = 1 (second cart items not merged); PRODUCT_2 missing from default cart
Cleanup: Second cart remains unless explicitly removed — add manual cleanup if needed

Title: xCart — mergeCart with deleteAfterMerge=true
Preconditions: Runner-native. Merges a named second cart into default with deleteAfterMerge=true. Verifies second cart is deleted post-merge.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=merge] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=merge] data.mergeCart.itemsCount >= 2
[DATA label=verify_second_gone] data.cart is null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=verify_second_gone] Second cart by name returns null (deleted)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; second cart still accessible after delete; data loss on default
Cleanup: Default cart still has merged items — clearCart at end

Title: xCart — removeCart Happy Path
Preconditions: Runner-native. Creates a NAMED cart (not default — removing default is risky), removes it, verifies removal.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=remove] errors[] empty
[DATA label=remove] data.removeCart = true
[DATA label=verify_gone] data.cart is null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] removeCart returns Boolean (no sub-selection on Boolean — DV-010 trap)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; removeCart returns false; cart still queryable after remove

Title: xCart — removeCart with Invalid cartId
Preconditions: Runner-native. Attempts removeCart with zero-GUID cartId. Expects false or error — never HTTP 500.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP remove_bogus]
  mutation { removeCart(command: { cartId: "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) }
[GQL-EXEC remove_bogus]
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Either data.removeCart = false OR errors[] non-empty with descriptive not-found. NO HTTP 500 or stack traces. No real user cart deleted by invalid ID.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; real user cart deleted; stack trace leaks

Title: xCart — removeCartItem with Invalid lineItemId
Preconditions: Runner-native. Adds a real item, then calls removeCartItem on zero-GUID lineItemId. Verifies real item is preserved (no corruption).
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Either errors[] non-empty with not-found OR itemsCount preserved at 1 (real item intact). NO HTTP 500.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; real item removed by invalid ID (cart data corruption — P0); itemsCount = 0

Title: xCart — addOrUpdateCartShipment Updates Method
Preconditions: Runner-native. Sets FixedRate/Ground, then updates to FixedRate/Air (same method code but different option). Verifies shipment updated in place (not duplicated).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=shipment_ground] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=shipment_air] errors[] empty
[DATA label=shipment_air] data.addOrUpdateCartShipment.shipments is non-null
[COUNT label=shipment_air] data.addOrUpdateCartShipment.shipments.length = 1
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] shipments[0].shipmentMethodOption = Air (updated, not duplicated). shipments.length stays at 1 — single shipment mutation is UPDATE, not INSERT.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; shipments[] has 2 entries (duplicate instead of update); shipmentMethodOption still Ground

Title: xCart — getSavedForLater Query
Preconditions: Runner-native. Queries user's save-for-later cart (typically a named cart of type 'saved-for-later'). May return null or empty if user has none.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] data.getSavedForLater is non-null (returns a cart even if empty) OR null if user has never used save-for-later. Either is acceptable.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; unhandled exception; stack trace leaks

Title: xCart — configurationItems Query

Configurable-product add flow is complex (section IDs, dependency chains) — see test-data/products/configurable-products.csv.

Title: xCart — Shipment Address Update Preserves Key (No DB Duplication)
Preconditions: Runner-native. Sets shipment address, captures address.id/key, updates the address (same key), verifies address is UPDATED in place (not duplicated in cart.addresses[]).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=shipment_update] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=shipment_update] data.addOrUpdateCartShipment.shipments.length = 1
[DATA label=shipment_update] data.addOrUpdateCartShipment.shipments.0.deliveryAddress.line1 = 456 Updated Blvd
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] shipments.length stays 1 across updates (no DB duplication). deliveryAddress.firstName=Updated after second call (update-in-place verified).
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; shipments[] has 2 entries (duplicate shipment); line1 still = 123 Test St (stale cache)
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.addOrUpdateCartShipment address key preservation
